steps.title: Fastest path: use the function table
steps.content: Enter the function in Desmos or a calculator table, then plug in the requested input. The output is $1,080$, so the answer is C, 1,080. This is just a one-row lookup, and the arithmetic below confirms the table value.

steps.title: Simplify the coefficient
steps.content:
In the first parenthesis, combine like terms:
$$x + 0.25x = (1 + 0.25)x = 1.25x$$
So the function becomes:
$$f(x) = 1.25x(60 - x)$$

steps.title: Substitute x = 24 and calculate
steps.content:
$$f(24) = 1.25(24)(60 - 24)$$
Evaluate each part:
  • $1.25 \times 24 = 30$
  • $60 - 24 = 36$
Then multiply:
$$f(24) = 30 \times 36 = 1,080$$
That matches the correct answer - C is correct.
